task: Delete all but one of any recipes in the Broccoli app that are exact duplicates, ensuring at least one instance of each unique recipe remains

steps.thought:
[Observation]
The current screen is the phone's home screen. Visible apps include Gmail, Photos, YouTube, Phone, Messages, Chrome, and another Gmail icon in the dock. The target app "Broccoli" is not visible on this screen.

[Plan]
Step 1: Open the Broccoli app → | Step 2: Navigate to the recipes list | Step 3: Identify duplicate recipes | Step 4: Delete all but one instance of each duplicate recipe

[Decision]
Based on the observation, I am on the home screen and the Broccoli app is not present among the shortcuts. To proceed with the task of managing recipes within the Broccoli app, I need to launch it first. Since it's not on the home screen, I will use the system's open app function to launch "Broccoli - Recipe App".

[Memory]
First action, no prior memory.

[Observation]
The current screen displays the "Recipes" list in the Broccoli app. I can see several recipes: "Baked Cod with Lemon and Dill", "BBQ Chicken Quesadillas", "Eggplant Parmesan" (appears twice), "Raspberry Almond Smoothie", and "Shrimp Avocado Salad". There are two identical entries for "Eggplant Parmesan" with the same description "An ideal recipe for experimenting with different flavors and ingredients."

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Broccoli app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to the recipes list ✓ | Step 3: Identify duplicate recipes ✓ | Step 4: Delete all but one instance of each duplicate recipe →

[Decision]
Based on the observation, I have identified "Eggplant Parmesan" as an exact duplicate. To proceed with deleting one of the instances while keeping the other, I need to open the recipe first to find the delete option. I will tap on the first "Eggplant Parmesan" card to view its details.

[Memory]
Identified duplicate: "Eggplant Parmesan" (two instances). Proceeding to delete the first instance.

[Observation]
The current screen displays the details page for the recipe "Eggplant Parmesan". The page shows servings (6 servings), time (3 hrs), ingredients ("as per recipe"), and directions. In the top right corner of the app bar, there is a heart icon and a three-dot menu icon (more options).

[Plan Update]
Step 1-3: Open app and identify duplicate ✓ | Step 4: Delete the identified duplicate recipe (Eggplant Parmesan) → | Step 5: Verify only one instance remains in the list

Since there is no direct "Delete" button on the main screen, it is typically located within the more options menu. I will tap the three-dot menu icon in the top right corner to access the menu where the delete option should be available.

[Memory]
Identified duplicate: "Eggplant Parmesan" (two instances). Currently on the details page of the first instance, preparing to delete it.

[Observation]
The current screen displays the "Eggplant Parmesan" recipe details page. A dropdown menu is open in the top right corner, showing options: "Share", "Share as file", "Edit", and "Delete".

Step 1-3: Open app and identify duplicate ✓ | Step 4: Delete the identified duplicate recipe (Eggplant Parmesan) → | Step 5: Verify only one instance remains in the list

Based on the current plan step to delete this duplicate recipe, and the observation that the dropdown menu is now open with a "Delete" option available, I will select "Delete" to remove this specific instance of "Eggplant Parmesan". I will tap on "Delete".

[Memory]
Identified duplicate: "Eggplant Parmesan" (two instances). Currently deleting the first instance of "Eggplant Parmesan". Will need to check if there are other duplicates after this deletion.

The screen displays a confirmation dialog box asking "Delete this recipe?" with two options: "CANCEL" and "DELETE". The background shows the "Eggplant Parmesan" recipe details page, which is slightly dimmed.

Step 1-3: Open app and identify duplicate ✓ | Step 4: Delete the identified duplicate recipe (Eggplant Parmesan) → | Step 5: Verify only one instance remains in the list

The current step in the plan is to delete the duplicate recipe. I have initiated the deletion process, and now a confirmation dialog has appeared. To finalize the deletion of this duplicate "Eggplant Parmesan" recipe, I need to confirm the action. I will tap the "DELETE" button on the dialog.

[Memory]
Identified duplicate: "Eggplant Parmesan" (two instances). Currently confirming the deletion of the first instance of "Eggplant Parmesan". After this, will need to check the recipe list to ensure only one instance remains and verify if there are any other duplicates.

The screen shows the "All recipes" list. The visible recipes are: "Baked Cod with Lemon and Dill", "BBQ Chicken Quesadillas", "Eggplant Parmesan", "Raspberry Almond Smoothie", "Shrimp Avocado Salad", and "Spicy Tuna Wraps". There is now only one instance of "Eggplant Parmesan" in the list.

Reviewing the rest of the list ("Baked Cod...", "BBQ Chicken...", "Raspberry Almond...", "Shrimp Avocado...", "Spicy Tuna..."), all other recipes are unique.
